episodes.title: The Shining Path - A Communist Death Cult
episodes.description: Deep in the mountains of Peru, a violent insurgency began that would leave tens of thousands dead and an entire nation traumatised. This video explores the rise of the Shining Path — a Maoist guerrilla movement led by Abimael Guzmán — and the brutal conflict that unfolded across Peru during the 1980s and 1990s.
